title: Rospiggar
writer: Albert Engström, Erik Lundegård, Torsten Lundqvist
actors: Sigurd Wallén, Emil Fjellström, Gull Natorp
plot: When islander Efraim Österman is going to take care of his dead brother's left over property, he finds a will. It turns out that the brother has an unknown son in Stockholm. Efraim finds best not to tell the son. First he's going ...
